emails.subject: New Product Startup: Bandwidth
emails.body: Mark, Attached is a copy of the OTC GTC which the Bandwidth group wishes to use for Bandwidth trading on EnronOnline, launching May 1. Could you please let me know which of your guys will be looking after reviewing/amending this for EnronOnline? Thanks, Dave Forwarded by David Forster/LON/ECT on 03/27/2000 11:22 PM Jay Hawthorn ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 03/23/2000 07:25 PM

emails.subject: Re: New Product Startup: Bandwidth
emails.body: Re: New Product Startup: Bandwidth I believe that this is not the GTC but rather the master agreement used for bandwidth. I spoke with Cynthia Harkness, one of the bandwidth lawyers, last week. My impression was that the bandwidth trading documentation was still in flux and they were waiting for it to settle down before preparing a GTC. David Forster 03/27/2000 04:26 PM

emails.subject: Re: New Product Startup: Bandwidth
emails.body: Mark, What differences are you expecting between the Master and a GTC? Can we not use the Master as the basis for a GTC? Dave Mark Taylor 03/29/2000 01:16 AM
